title: Nursery Rhyme. CCXXXVI. Riddles.
content:
Old father Graybeard,
            Without tooth or tongue;
        If you'll give me your finger,
            I'll give you my thumb.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Unknown, titled "Nursery Rhyme. CCXXXVI. Riddles.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
